name: Dean, R&D & Research Park
description: Prof. Dr. P. Chandra Kumar provides strategic leadership for Vel Tech's Office of Research & Development and the Research Park, fostering a dynamic ecosystem of innovation, industry collaboration, and interdisciplinary research excellence.
sub_description: As Dean, he spearheads major research initiatives, leads industry partnerships, and supervises technology incubation activities, empowering faculty and scholars to realize impactful innovations and drive transformative change.
